reason: 建前 is the public/official position (vs 本音), not "face"; example contrasts 本音と建前.
他方 = the other (of two); "one" is 一方/片方. Example: 片方は薄く、他方は厚い.
着工 specifically means commencement of construction; "starting work" is too generic and duplicates 着手.
月並 (つきなみ) means commonplace/trite/mediocre; "every month" is a literal misreading. Example: 月並みのパーティー = just another party.
手当 means allowance/benefit (or medical treatment), not salary (給料).
振り出し means the start/starting point; "shaking out" is a literal misread. Example: 振り出しに戻る = back to square one.
